nasb.text: so that, as sin reigned in death, even so grace would reign through righteousness to eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.

esv.text: so that, as sin reigned in death, grace also might reign through righteousness leading to eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.

cnv.text: 罪藉著死掌權；照樣，恩典也藉著義掌權，使人藉著我們的主耶穌基督進入永生。

ccb.text: 罪怎样掌权带来死亡，恩典也照样借着义掌权，为要借着我们主耶稣基督带来永生。

csbs.text: 这样，就像罪藉着死亡掌权，恩典也照样藉着义掌权，使人藉着我们的主耶稣基督进入永恒的生命。
